description_long: This is a streamlined steam locomotive with a tender, painted in a dark green livery with gold lining and insignia, reminiscent of classic British express trains such as the LNER Class A4. The locomotive features a sleek, aerodynamic front with a sloped nose and integrated headlamp, and a long, low-slung boiler. The side view reveals large driving wheels, a series of smaller leading and trailing wheels, and a tender attached at the rear, filled with coal. The body is mostly smooth with subtle panel lines and rivets, and the tender bears a prominent emblem. The windows are small and spaced along the cab, with no visible passenger compartments. The overall design emphasizes speed and elegance, typical of mid-20th-century express steam engines.
description: A streamlined, dark green steam locomotive with a tender, gold lining, and large driving wheels, evoking classic British express trains. The design is sleek and aerodynamic, with a coal-filled tender and subtle detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped, aerodynamic nose, central headlamp, and narrow profile of the locomotive.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the locomotive and tender, large driving wheels, gold lining, and emblem on the tender.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the tender, coal storage area, and the coupling mechanism.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the locomotive and tender with consistent detailing.
attribute_door_placement: doors at each end of the locomotive cab
attribute_window_arrangement: spaced small windows on the cab
